training_dataset: ml-latest-small (NOT ml-32m, despite earlier README claims)
rating_scale_note: Trainset was built with Surprise's default Reader(rating_scale=(1, 5)) even though ml-latest-small stores 0.5-step ratings. Surprise retains the actual values in training (a 0.5-star rating goes through as 0.5) but clips predictions to >= 1.0. The Phase 0 fix in src/data_processing.py uses (0.5, 5.0) for future trainings.

hyperparams_baked_in.note: Exact training hyperparams cannot be recovered post-hoc — only n_factors is visible on the pickle. lr_all and reg_all defaulted to 0.005 and 0.02 per src/config.DEFAULT_SVDPP_PARAMS.

usage: Phase 1 candidate generator (secondary). New users handled via ridge-regression fold-in (src/reranking.SVDScorer.fold_in).
queued_followup: Retrain on ml-32m for full catalog coverage (87k+ items vs 9.7k). Run scripts/train_als.py-style pipeline but with Surprise SVD++.
